name: Hersha Hospitality Trust 6.50% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest $0.01 par value per share
summary: Hersha Hospitality Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in hotels. The company owns and operates upscale hotels in urban gateway markets and regional destinations. Hersha Hospitality Trust is based in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania.
